The Energy Security Team leads the OCEEA’s work on energy security, focusing on critical energy infrastructure protection, sustainable energy, energy efficiency and facilitating dialogue among participating States. Chief Medical Officer OSCE Vienna (Norwegian citizens only) Vienna, Austria POSTING DATE03/27/2026 BE THE FIRST TO APPLY The Organization for Security and Co‑operation in Europe (OSCE) is the world’s largest regional security organization, comprising 57 participating States across Europe, Central Asia, and North America. It serves as a platform for dialogue, cooperation, and conflict prevention, promoting stability through a broad concept of security that includes politico‑military, economic‑environmental, and human rights dimensions.
